welcome.subject: Welcome to ProFundX!
welcome.body: Thank you for creating an account. Please verify your email to get started.
welcome.footer: If you didn't create this account, please ignore this email.

passwordReset.subject: Reset Your ProFundX Password
passwordReset.body: Click the button below to reset your password. This link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request this, please ignore this email.

payoutApproved.subject: Payout Approved — {{amount}}
payoutApproved.body: Your payout request for {{amount}} has been approved and will be processed shortly.

payoutRejected.subject: Payout Update
payoutRejected.body: Your payout request for {{amount}} has been reviewed. Please contact support for details.

marginCall.subject: Margin Call — Account {{accountId}}
marginCall.body: Your account {{accountId}} has reached the margin call level. Please add funds or close positions to avoid liquidation.

stopOut.subject: Stop Out — Account {{accountId}}
stopOut.body: Your account {{accountId}} has been stopped out. Some or all positions have been closed.

violation.subject: Rule Violation — Account {{accountId}}
violation.body: Your account {{accountId}} has violated a trading rule: {{rule}}.
